title: [FIRRTL] Simplify PrefixModules pass
body:
`PrefixModules` is a global pass that renames the modules based on certain annotation.
 It seems to be a relatively expensive pass for just renaming the modules.
Can we simplify the pass for certain cases, like avoiding cloning modules, when each module is instantiated only once. 
Or, perform it using `verilogName` attribute during `LowerToHW` ?
Some interesting discussion in the original PR: https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/1183
This is a snapshot of runtime for an internal test case (`p550`) for the FIRRTL pipeline.
